label: Fight: Wound Others
description: Defeating this villain wounds other players (reveal-or-punish)

label: Fight: KO Hero
description: Defeating this villain costs you a hero (KO from your cards)

label: Fight: Gain Hero
description: Defeating this villain gives you a free hero or the villain becomes a hero

label: Fight: Recruit
description: Defeating this villain gives recruit points or a free card

label: Ambush: Capture
description: This villain captures bystanders when entering the city

label: Ambush: Cascade
description: This villain plays additional villain deck cards on entry
